name: propagationModel
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.cells.every(function(c){ return Number.isFinite(c.eirpDbm) && Number.isFinite(c.linkBudgetDb) && Number.isFinite(c.effectiveRangeKm) && Number.isFinite(c.coverageKm2) && Number.isFinite(c.edgeRsrpDbm); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (path-3; NOT assassin-enumerated). RFPlanner PropagationTab sends FLAT params {rxSensitivityDbm,fadeMarginDb,mobileHeightM}; reads per-user saved towers (or params.towers). COST-231 Hata path loss → link budget = EIRP - rxSens - fadeMargin → binary-searched effective range × terrain attenuation. RETURNS cells[{id,name,lat,lon,terrain,freqMhz,eirpDbm,linkBudgetDb,effectiveRangeKm,coverageKm2,edgeRsrpDbm,edgeQuality}] + totalCoverageKm2 — the exact keys the PropResult table renders. Rejects (ok:false) with no towers. POISON: powerWatts/freqMhz/heightM via num() → finite defaults; every cell number stays FINITE. State-backed (towers map). Pinned by server/tests/telecommunications-lens-macros.test.js.
